CONTENT.expand_your_freedom: Expand your freedom, open your LLC in the United States
CONTENT.expand_your_freedom_description: We solve your doubts about creating your LLC, opening bank accounts and other services. Our team is ready to accompany you in each step of the process.
CONTENT.open_your_bank_account: Open your bank account in the United States with your active LLC
CONTENT.open_your_bank_account_description: Grow your business with a 100% operational business account from anywhere in the world.
CONTENT.open_your_bank_account_description_2: Connect your LLC to a bank account in the United States and access a solid, reliable, and global financial system.

how_to_open_llc.title: How to open your LLC in

step1.title: Tell us about your business
step1.description: Explore your business needs with us. We will design a customized solution that fits your case.

step2.title: Send your documentation online.
step2.description: Upload your documents through our platform and our team will manage your LLC and the opening of your bank account in the United States.

step3.title: Receive your documents in 10 business days
step3.description: You will receive all the legal certificates and access to your bank account in a maximum of 10 business days.

benefits.title2: of a LLC in the United States

benefit1.title: Global access
benefit1.description: Operate globally, make sales in dollars and manage bank accounts through platforms like Relay and Mercury.

benefit2.title: Privacy and protection
benefit2.description: Protect your identity and assets with an LLC, ensuring anonymity and security against risks.

benefit3.title: 100% online
benefit3.description: Carry out the entire process online and access international markets without having to travel.

benefit4.title: Robust finances
benefit4.description: Manage dollar accounts, use international payment platforms and access financing options in the United States.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: We empower entrepreneurs and independent workers with reliable solutions to establish and manage businesses in the United States.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: We aspire to be the reference in consulting and business creation in the United States, recognized for our transparency, professionalism and focus on the needs of our clients.

empresarial-strategy.title: Effective business
empresarial-strategy.description: Discover how we make successful businesses a reality

potential.title: Power up
potential.description: Discover how to comply with legal regulations to sell internationally with your LLC

1.title: International specialization
1.description: We support international entrepreneurs in creating businesses in global markets, promoting their expansion and strengthening their business opportunities worldwide.

2.title: Comprehensive support
2.description: We offer expert advice on tax planning, legal compliance, accounting and finance to ensure the sustainable success of your business. We facilitate the integration of payment platforms like Stripe to expand your international reach.

3.title: No geographical barriers
3.description: We facilitate the opening of businesses and bank accounts without the need to reside in the United States, eliminating geographical barriers and allowing your business to access new international markets.

FOOTER.description: Ebizboost LLC acts as an intermediary in the facilitation of legal and banking procedures in the United States. It is not part of government entities and does not have banking alliances. It is not responsible for the misuse of accounts or incorrect information. By scheduling a call and accepting the requirements sent, the user accepts the no-refund clause. Additionally, Ebizboost LLC will share only the necessary information related to the requirements explained and sent after the conversation. The user implicitly accepts, either verbally or through any official contact channel, that the information provided is correct and complete.
